subcodes.title: Words spoken at 309 W 78th St in New York, 1912-07-17
subcodes.first_line: The holding of last night's meeting was done with wisdom... My discourses in various gatherings have been founded on principles that are in conformity with reality
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیشب وضع مجلس خیلی موافق حکمت و مورث محبت بود که عقد و ازدواج اهل بها در مجلس بقانون مسیحی هم جاری شود تا نفوس بدانند که اهل بها در بند این رسومات جزئیه نیستند
subcodes.subjects: @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @wisdom [hikmat], @oneness; unity of religion, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @changing and unchanging parts of religion
